title: Savory Crispy Turkish Lamb Stir-fry
description: A post-workout-friendly dish featuring tender lamb cubes cooked with aromatic spices in a crispy bhuna sauce for a burst of flavor and texture.

ingredients.name: bhuna masala mix
ingredients.notes: includes chili powder, turmeric, coriander seeds, and cumin seeds

ingredients.name: red bell pepper
ingredients.notes: chopped finely for color and crunch

instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). Season lamb with salt and pepper.
In a large pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and ginger, sauté for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Add sliced onions and cook until translucent, about 2-3 minutes. Stir in bhuna masala mix and cook for another 2 minutes.
Toss in halved red bell peppers and carrots, season with salt and pepper again, then stir well to combine.
Transfer lamb pieces into the pan along with remaining spices. Sauté until lamb is browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Reduce heat to low-medium and bake in oven for 15-20 minutes or until lamb reaches your desired doneness (internal temperature of 63°C/145°F).
Serve hot with a side salad or whole wheat naan bread.
